title: Login security professional
description: This is a professional login plugin it will make you server more secure. Why you use this? If you ask why then this is the answer.it have the function from which after the logs he will tp to lobby
body:
![The Login Security Professional  provides a powerful and reliable protection system to keep your players’ accounts safe. Designed with performance and simplicity in mind, it ensures that every player is verified before accessing the server. With secure authentication, flexible configuration, and smooth user experience, this plugin adds an essential layer of defense against unauthorized access.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d360bd1f107e45d4c1f2bb68de726e2b38e819b7_0.webp)The Login Security Professional  provides a powerful and reliable protection system to keep your players’ accounts safe. Designed with performance and simplicity in mind, it ensures that every player is verified before accessing the server. With secure authentication, flexible configuration, and smooth user experience, this plugin adds an essential layer of defense against unauthorized access.
**COMMANDS**               
/login <pass>.                         
/register <pass> <confirm pass>.             
/setlogspawn set a spawn point in which the player will automatically teleport to the spawn.                
/changepass <old pass>  <new pass>.
